case_title: BAKER, STEPHEN VS DESOTO CAB CO.

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BAKER, STEPHEN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DESOTO CAB CO. $1,100.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,100.00, PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT STIPULATE TO THE JUDGMENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT DESOTO CAB CO.
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DESOTO CAB CO.
